name: Clippy
description: This project is a Solana-based digital asset that represents the on-chain presence of an independent creative and technical initiative led by Kevan Atteberry. The token is designed to function as a community-oriented asset that connects on-chain activity with off-chain creative work, research, and public content produced by the creator. Rather than serving as a financial instrument or protocol utility token, the project focuses on transparency, provenance, and direct blockchain-based interaction between the creator and participants. The token exists on the Solana network and can be freely transferred, traded, and verified on-chain. Its primary purpose is to act as a decentralized reference point for community engagement, digital identity, and value exchange within an openly accessible blockchain environment.
